mapper.insert: INSERT INTO NOTIFICATION (event_type, channel_type, recipient_key, recipient_value, title, body, idempotency_key, status, retry_cnt, created_at) values (#{eventType}, #{channelType}, #{recipientKey}, #{recipientValue}, #{title}, #{body}, #{idempotencyKey}, #{status}, #{retryCnt}, SYSDATE)
mapper.select: SELECT notification_id, event_type, channel_type, recipient_key, recipient_value, title, body, idempotency_key, status, retry_cnt, max_retry_cnt, next_retry_at, last_error_code, last_error_message, created_at, processing_started_at, sent_at FROM ( SELECT notification_id, event_type, channel_type, recipient_key, recipient_value, title, body, idempotency_key, status, retry_cnt, max_retry_cnt, next_retry_at, last_error_code, last_error_message, created_at, processing_started_at, sent_at FROM NOTIFICATION WHERE status = 'PENDING' OR (status = 'RETRY_SCHEDULED' AND next_retry_at <= SYSTIMESTAMP) ORDER BY created_at ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1
mapper.update: UPDATE NOTIFICATION SET status = 'SENT', sent_at = SYSTIMESTAMP, last_error_code = NULL, last_error_message = NULL WHERE notification_id = #{notificationId}

UPDATE NOTIFICATION SET status = 'RETRY_SCHEDULED', retry_cnt = #{retryCnt}, next_retry_at = #{nextRetryAt}, last_error_code = #{lastErrorCode}, last_error_message = #{lastErrorMessage} WHERE notification_id = #{notificationId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO DELIVERY_ATTEMPT ( notification_id, attempt_no, attempt_status, started_at, finished_at, error_code, error_message ) VALUES ( #{notificationId}, #{attemptNo}, #{attemptStatus}, #{startedAt}, #{finishedAt}, #{errorCode}, #{errorMessage} )
mapper.update: UPDATE NOTIFICATION SET status = 'PENDING', next_retry_at = NULL, last_error_code = NULL, last_error_message = NULL, updated_at = SYSTIMESTAMP WHERE notification_id = #{notificationId} AND status = #{currentStatus}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ADMIN_ACTION_LOG ( notification_id, admin_id, action_type, action_reason, created_at ) VALUES ( #{notificationId}, #{adminId}, #{actionType}, #{actionReason}, SYSTIMESTAMP )
